flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Los Angeles Pierce College rose 42% between 2007 and 2010 ($3.5k → $5.0k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Los Angeles Pierce College rose 18% between 2007 and 2010 ($590 → $699).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Los Angeles Pierce College rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 ($9.0k → $10.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Los Angeles Pierce College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (5.0% → 0.0%).
